Now I have a clearer picture of the layout:
Left panel (white, id=1): [21,9]-[41,32]
- Charcoal frame (id=10): [32,11]-[36,15] with light gray interior (id=11): [33,12]-[35,14]
- Green frame (id=6): [30,15]-[32,17] with white pixel (id=8): [31,16] - PLAYER
Middle: Purple bar (id=2): [21,33]-[41,38]
Right panel (white, id=3): [21,39]-[41,53]
- Charcoal frame (id=4): [26,44]-[30,48] with light gray interior (id=5): [27,45]-[29,47]
- Green frame (id=7): [30,42]-[32,44] with charcoal pixel (id=9): [31,43] - TARGET
Bottom: Timer bar (id=12, charcoal): [63,0]-[63,51] and (id=13, white): [63,52]-[63,63]
So the layout is:
- Left panel: charcoal frame (lower) + green frame with player (upper)
- Middle: purple vertical bar
- Right panel: charcoal frame (upper) + green frame with target (lower)
The player is at (31, 16) in the left panel, near the charcoal frame. The target is at (31, 43) in the right panel.
I've discovered:
1. Arrow keys move the player (green frame) left/right
2. MOUSE clicks on center pixels swap colors between the two green frames
Now I need to figure out the goal. Looking at the charcoal frames:
- Left charcoal frame has a light gray (w) 3x3 interior
- Right charcoal frame has a light gray (w) 3x3 interior
The green frames have single-pixel centers. The player's center is white (W) and the target's center is charcoal (c) after I swapped them.
Maybe the goal is to:
1. Move the player to overlap with a charcoal frame
2. Click to transfer the player's color into the charcoal frame
3. Complete some pattern
Or maybe the goal is to get the player to the target location and then click to complete the level.
Let me try a different approach. Let me move the player to the right panel's charcoal frame location and see what happens when I click.
The right charcoal frame is at [26,44]-[30,48] with interior at [27,45]-[29,47]. The center is at (28, 46).
The player is at (31, 16). I need to move the player to around row 28, col 46.
But wait, the player can only move left/right, not up/down (or can it?). Let me try moving UP.
Actually, let me first try to move the player to the right panel's green frame location (where the target is) and see if clicking there does something different.
The target green frame is at [30,42]-[32,44], center at (31, 43). The player is at (31, 16). I need to move right by 27 cells. Each RIGHT moves 3 cells, so 9 RIGHT moves.
But earlier, the player got stuck at col 31 when trying to move right. Let me check if the player can move further right now.
Actually wait, looking at the image, the player's green frame is now overlapping with the charcoal frame in the left panel. Maybe I need to click on the charcoal frame to do something.
Let me try clicking on the charcoal frame's interior in the left panel.
